'''''Defiance''''' was a [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] that served with the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]] during [[Operation Shadow Hand]]. It was the first [[Warship/Legends|warship]] of the new [[MC90 Star Cruiser]] class of vessel.<ref name="DE" />

==History==
[[File:Mc90sideview.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Sideview of the ''Defiance''.]]

''Defiance'' replaced [[Home One/Legends|''Home One'']] as the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]] during the campaign against the reborn [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]].
Ackbar took the ship when he ventured on a recon mission to the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Galactic Core]]. The ''Defiance'' managed to penetrate [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] territory as far as [[Byss/Legends|Byss]], where it observed a fleet of thousands of warships. The ship's transponder was damaged by an Imperial convoy and the ship returned to the [[Pinnacle Base]] to report its finding.<ref name="SW:DEa">[[Dark Empire (audio drama)|''Dark Empire'' audio drama]]</ref>

One of the most powerful vessels in the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]], the vessel remained the flagship for the [[Supreme Commander (Alliance)/Legends|Supreme Commander]] until he chose ''[[Galactic Voyager]]'' shortly after Admiral [[Natasi Daala|Daala's]] attack on [[Dac/Legends|Dac]].<ref name="DS">[[Darksaber (novel)|''Darksaber'']]</ref>
